title: Kenyan Shrimp and Crunchy Corn Fritters
description: A delicious Kenyan-inspired dish featuring succulent shrimp and crunchy corn fritters, perfect for a snack or light meal.

ingredients.name: i
ingredients.notes: this ingredient is not clear. Assume a common ingredient like oil or water

instructions: In a bowl, mix together the cornmeal, crunchy, and a pinch of salt.
Add the shrimp to the bowl and toss to coat with the cornmeal mixture.
Heat a griddle over medium heat.
Drop spoonfuls of the shrimp mixture onto the griddle.
Cook for 2-3 minutes on each side, until golden brown and crispy.
